notes: Solid, complete Snake implementation with countdown, pause, bonus items, particles, and high score persistence; minor visual polish could be improved but all core mechanics work correctly.

Excellent implementation with solid mechanics, nice visual touches (particles, eyes, apple stem), but lacks an input queue for rapid double-turns and the bonus star rendering logic is slightly flawed (only draws 5 vertices instead of 10).
Solid snake implementation with title/countdown/pause/bonus features, but strict one-press direction handling can miss fast turns and Escape behavior is overloaded in a slightly awkward way.
